description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push events. Run a windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up the MSVC development environment for amd64 architecture, and caches vcpkg dependencies in C:/vcpkg-cache. Then, download Drawdance from a specified repository and branch, build and package it using PowerShell scripts, and finally upload the resulting artifact drawpile-win-msvc.zip.
